{{Quote|You killed my world. My parents, my people. Everyone of them gone, absorbed, murdered, mutilated....|[[Dev Sibwarra]] to [[Sh'tk'ith|Bluescale]]|<ref name="The Truce at Bakura">''[[The Truce at Bakura]]''</ref>}}
'''G'rho''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]] on the [[Shiritoku Spur]] and was where [[Forest/Legends|forests]] of [[juvica]] grew. A remote colony, its colonists raised [[duncow]]s and built [[Boku Settlement]] near a rich vein of crimson ore. [[Dev Sibwarra]]'s family moved there shortly after his [[Reproduction/Legends|birth]] in [[11 BBY/Legends|11 BBY]] when they fled [[Chandrila/Legends|Chandrila]].

==History==
{{Quote|...His Highness is shocked and appalled at the senseless nature of the attack. No effort will be spared to apprehend all the terrorists involved.|Aides to Emperor Palpatine|<ref name="TBSB">''[[The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook]]''</ref>}}
In [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]], G'rho was [[Battle of G'rho|attacked]] by the [[Ssi-ruuvi Imperium]] from the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]]. [[Dev Sibwarra]] was captured for study, while the remaining colonists were either killed in the raid or [[Entechment|enteched]] by the [[Ssi-ruu]]k.

Shortly after, [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], who had made a secret agreement with the Imperium, covered up the incident on the colony and instead blamed the attack on the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. The Ssi-ruuvi Imperium then built a [[G'rho entechment dome|dome]] on the surface to began entechment of the colonists.

==Behind the scenes==
The PC [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] mistakenly places G'rho in the [[Xappyh sector/Legends|Xappyh sector]].
